title: Remove Checkbox And Wait
goal: Remove the checkbox on the dynamic controls page and stop when the completion message appears.
instruction: Remove the checkbox and stop when the page confirms that it is gone.
review_notes: Exercises changing page state after asynchronous UI control removal.

steps.explanation: I triggered removal of the checkbox. The page should confirm the change after it finishes updating.

action.summary: The checkbox was removed and the page confirmed it, so I stopped there.

steps.explanation: The checkbox is gone and the confirmation message is visible, so I am ending the task.
